# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.

Prevent cloud compute security.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  projectName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Project name used as prefix for all resources
    minLength: 2
    maxLength: 10

  vmCount:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 2
    minValue: 1
    maxValue: 10
    metadata:
      description: Number of developer VMs to create

  vmSize:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Standard_B2ms
    allowedValues:
      - Standard_B2s
      - Standard_B2ms
      - Standard_B4ms
      - Standard_D2s_v5
      - Standard_D4s_v5
    metadata:
      description: Size of the developer VMs

  osType:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Windows
    allowedValues:
      - Windows
      - Linux
    metadata:
      description: Operating system type for the VMs

  adminUsername:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Administrator username for the VMs
    minLength: 1

  adminPasswordOrKey:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: Administrator password (Windows) or SSH public key (Linux)

  authenticationType:
    type: string
    defaultValue: password
    allowedValues:
      - password
      - sshPublicKey
    metadata:
      description: Authentication type - password for Windows, sshPublicKey recommended for Linux

  allowedSourceIPRange:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: >-
        REQUIRED - Your office/VPN CIDR range (e.g., 203.0.113.0/24).
        Do NOT use 0.0.0.0/0 or * as this exposes VMs to the entire internet.
    minLength: 7

  environment:
    type: string
    defaultValue: dev
    allowedValues:
      - dev
      - staging
    metadata:
      description: Environment tag

  autoShutdownTime:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "1900"
    metadata:
      description: Auto-shutdown time in HHmm format (24hr UTC) to reduce costs and attack surface

  autoShutdownTimeZone:
    type: string
    defaultValue: UTC
    metadata:
      description: Time zone for auto-shutdown

variables:
  vnetName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-vnet')]"
  vnetAddressPrefix: 10.0.0.0/16
  subnetName: dev-subnet
  subnetAddressPrefix: 10.0.1.0/24
  nsgName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-nsg')]"
  windowsImageReference:
    publisher: MicrosoftWindowsDesktop
    offer: windows-11
    sku: win11-22h2-pro
    version: latest
  linuxImageReference:
    publisher: Canonical
    offer: 0001-com-ubuntu-server-jammy
    sku: 22_04-lts-gen2
    version: latest
  imageReference: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), variables('windowsImageReference'), variables('linuxImageReference'))]"
  remoteAccessPort: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), 3389, 22)]"
  remoteAccessProtocol: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), 'RDP', 'SSH')]"
  linuxConfigSSH:
    disablePasswordAuthentication: true
    ssh:
      publicKeys:
        - path: "[concat('/home/', parameters('adminUsername'), '/.ssh/authorized_keys')]"
          keyData: "[parameters('adminPasswordOrKey')]"
  linuxConfigPassword:
    disablePasswordAuthentication: false

resources:
  # ---- Network Security Group with restricted access ----
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[variables('nsgName')]"
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      project: "[parameters('projectName')]"
      purpose: developer-access
    properties:
      securityRules:
        # Allow remote access ONLY from specified IP range
        - name: "[concat('Allow-', variables('remoteAccessProtocol'), '-FromAllowedRange')]"
          properties:
            priority: 1000
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "[variables('remoteAccessPort')]"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('allowedSourceIPRange')]"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            description: "[concat('Allow ', variables('remoteAccessProtocol'), ' from authorized IP range only')]"

        # Explicitly deny all other inbound remote access
        - name: "[concat('Deny-', variables('remoteAccessProtocol'), '-FromAll')]"
          properties:
            priority: 1100
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "[variables('remoteAccessPort')]"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            description: "[concat('Deny ', variables('remoteAccessProtocol'), ' from all other sources')]"

        # Deny all other inbound traffic from internet
        - name: Deny-All-Inbound-Internet
          properties:
            priority: 4000
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            description: Deny all other inbound internet traffic

  # ---- Virtual Network ----
  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[variables('vnetName')]"
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      project: "[parameters('projectName')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - "[variables('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
      subnets:
        - name: "[variables('subnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[variables('subnetAddressPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"

  # ---- Public IP Addresses ----
  - type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-dev-vm-', copyIndex(1), '-pip')]"
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      project: "[parameters('projectName')]"
      vmName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-dev-vm-', copyIndex(1))]"
    sku:
      name: Standard
      tier: Regional
    properties:
      publicIPAllocationMethod: Static
      publicIPAddressVersion: IPv4
      idleTimeoutInMinutes: 10
      dnsSettings:
        domainNameLabel: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-dev-vm-', copyIndex(1))]"
    copy:
      name: publicIPCopy
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"

  # ---- Network Interfaces ----
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-dev-vm-', copyIndex(1), '-nic')]"
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      project: "[parameters('projectName')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', variables('vnetName'))]"
      - publicIPCopy
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: ipconfig1
          properties:
            privateIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
            subnet:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', variables('vnetName'), variables('subnetName'))]"
            publicIPAddress:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-dev-vm-', copyIndex(1), '-pip'))]"
    copy:
      name: nicCopy
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"

  # ---- Virtual Machines ----
  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    apiVersion: "2023-07-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-dev-vm-', copyIndex(1))]"
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      project: "[parameters('projectName')]"
      developer-vm: "true"
      auto-shutdown: "enabled"
    dependsOn:
      - nicCopy
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: "[parameters('vmSize')]"
      storageProfile:
        imageReference: "[variables('imageReference')]"
        osDisk:
          name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-dev-vm-', copyIndex(1), '-osdisk')]"
          createOption: FromImage
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: Premium_LRS
          diskSizeGB: 128
      osProfile:
        computerName: "[concat('devvm', copyIndex(1))]"
        adminUsername: "[parameters('adminUsername')]"
        adminPassword: "[if(equals(parameters('authenticationType'), 'password'), parameters('adminPasswordOrKey'), null())]"
        linuxConfiguration: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), if(equals(parameters('authenticationType'), 'sshPublicKey'), variables('linuxConfigSSH'), variables('linuxConfigPassword')), null())]"
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-dev-vm-', copyIndex(1), '-nic'))]"
      diagnosticsProfile:
        bootDiagnostics:
          enabled: true
    copy:
      name: vmCopy
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"

  # ---- Auto-Shutdown Schedule (reduces attack surface when not in use) ----
  - type: Microsoft.DevTestLab/schedules
    apiVersion: "2018-09-15"
    name: "[concat('shutdown-computevm-', parameters('projectName'), '-dev-vm-', copyIndex(1))]"
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      project: "[parameters('projectName')]"
    dependsOn:
      - vmCopy
    properties:
      status: Enabled
      taskType: ComputeVmShutdownTask
      dailyRecurrence:
        time: "[parameters('autoShutdownTime')]"
      timeZoneId: "[parameters('autoShutdownTimeZone')]"
      targetResourceId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-dev-vm-', copyIndex(1)))]"
      notificationSettings:
        status: Enabled
        timeInMinutes: 30
        notificationLocale: en
    copy:
      name: shutdownCopy
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"

outputs:
  vmAccessInfo:
    type: array
    copy:
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      input:
        vmName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-dev-vm-', copyIndex(1))]"
        publicIP: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-dev-vm-', copyIndex(1), '-pip'))).ipAddress]"
        fqdn: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-dev-vm-', copyIndex(1), '-pip'))).dnsSettings.fqdn]"
        accessPort: "[variables('remoteAccessPort')]"
        protocol: "[variables('remoteAccessProtocol')]"

  securityReminder:
    type: string
    value: >-
      SECURITY NOTES: (1) Access is restricted to the IP range you specified.
      (2) Auto-shutdown is enabled to reduce exposure.
      (3) Consider enabling Azure AD login, MFA, and Microsoft Defender for Cloud.
      (4) For production workloads, migrate to Azure Bastion or VPN Gateway.
      (5) Regularly review and rotate credentials.
      (6) Enable Just-In-Time VM access in Microsoft Defender for Cloud for additional protection.

  nsgName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('nsgName')]"

  allowedSourceRange:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('allowedSourceIPRange')]"
